name: Task Status Report
query:
SELECT 
    t.name AS task_id,
    t.task_name,
    t.status,
    t.progress_ AS progress_percentage,
    p.project_name
FROM `tabTask` t
LEFT JOIN `tabProject` p ON p.name = t.project
ORDER BY p.project_name, FIELD(t.status, 'Planned', 'In Progress', 'On Hold', 'Completed', 'Cancelled');
